{{Quote|I'm getting better… still too cautious. Good thing I've some pros to learn from.|translated=1|Garm Totryl on his racing skills|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Garm Totryl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who was living in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]], on the desert [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
An enthusiastic rookie [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]], Totryl was attempting to climb the rankings at [[Motta]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] racing track when he was met by the amnesiac [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]—who was visiting the small [[Mining/Legends|mining]] town during his quest to find the [[Star Forge]]—in [[3956 BBY]]. At the time, Totryl was still quite new to the sport, and had only succeeded in posting a first-tier time on the local track.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player chooses to engage in the optional swoop racing and sidequest based therein, Garm Totryl's time is the first that must be beaten in order to obtain [[race bond]]s from Motta.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
